content: Configure Resend (apiKey + from=bibicars.eu); delivery via auto-fallback (branded domain pending verification in this Resend account)
Team_lead OTP email delivery (login + resend) with designed template; code emailed AND in admin panel
Admin UI for recipient config + pending OTP viewer (AdminSecurityPage.jsx)
Customer email-verification modal verified (register -> code -> modal)
Build customer Email-OTP 2FA method (backend + login challenge + cabinet UI + login modal + i18n)
End-to-end test all email/OTP flows (testing agent: backend 100%, frontend 95%, all features working)
